subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned towards the Dawning-Place of Eternity, that the sweet fragrances of the Lord of Nations may draw him unto Him on this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم اذکر من اقبل الی مطلع القدم لتجذبه نفحات مالک الامم فی هذا الیوم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
